rationale: Experiments 1 and 2 employ a '1×2 between-participants design in which practicing auditors assess fraud risk with or without access to a GPT-4o-powered chatbot,' indicating random assignment to AI vs. no-AI conditions. The setting is not a traditional lab (participants completed tasks via Qualtrics during training sessions) nor a real work engagement, making this a randomized controlled trial rather than a field experiment or lab task.
